close_reason: P4 test duplication between lib.rs and tests/ — not worth the extraction overhead for a small crate
description:
src/lib.rs:144-167 (FakeStore) and tests/caching_store.rs:17-68 (MockStore) define two mock SecretStore impls for the same purpose: counting calls and returning a preset value. They differ only in style:
- FakeStore uses AtomicUsize and &'static [u8] for value.
- MockStore uses Arc<Mutex<usize>> and String for value.

Neither approach is wrong; the duplication is the issue. If the inline mod tests goes away (sibling issue), this disappears too. If it stays, prefer the AtomicUsize style (cheaper, lock-free, no Mutex poisoning concern in tests).

P4 — only relevant if the inline tests issue is rejected.
title: Mock backend duplication: lib.rs and tests/ each define their own counting mock
